expectations.evidence: Used curl to call the Pushover API directly. No knowledge of ~/scripts/notify.py.
Included '--form-string priority=0' in the curl command.
Included 'Test notification from Claude Code - verifying Pushover setup is working correctly'.

expectations.text: Checks for required environment variables before sending
expectations.evidence: Checked after attempting to send rather than before. The curl command runs first, then checks if vars are set.

expectations.text: Reports success or failure of the notification delivery
expectations.evidence: Did not check the actual API response. Only described what the response would look like in theory.
